ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date_est" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., conference, non-conference) */,
  "game_status_text" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Final, In Progress) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference affiliation of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division affiliation of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "pts_home" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "pts_away" INTEGER /* Points scored by the visiting team */,
  "fg_pct_home" REAL /* Field goal percentage for the home team */,
  "fg_pct_away" REAL /* Field goal percentage for the visiting team */,
  "ft_pct_home" REAL /* Free throw percentage for the home team */,
  "ft_pct_away" REAL /* Free throw percentage for the visiting team */,
  "home_team_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds for the home team */,
  "away_team_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds for the visiting team */,
  "home_team_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers for the home team */,
  "away_team_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers for the visiting team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fg_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts by the player */,
  "three_pts_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pts_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the summary belongs to */,
  "game_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game, including notable events */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
